storyboard.content: I have a burning pain in my upper stomach, especially between meals and at night.
I feel full very quickly, even when I eat only a small amount.
I occasionally feel nauseated, though I have not vomited.
These symptoms have been slowly developing over the past 3 months.
The discomfort is moderate. It changes how I eat but I can still work and do daily activities.
Eating temporarily relieves the pain, but it comes back 2 to 3 hours later. Antacids help for a short while.
